description: CompositionBlue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingSlimWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using a mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroideryThis T-shirt from inkfruit pays tribute to the modern youth with its tongue-in-cheek cartoon of the yesteryear rock 'n roll legend, Elvis Presley. Turning conventional music adulation on its head, while keeping it in the spotight, this tee is a must-have. Pair this with distressed jeans and branded slippers to come off as the modern irreverant man of the moment. Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
